notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien grid movement, shields, UFO, multi-wave progression, and audio; alien sprites are functional but blocky/simplified compared to classic pixel art, and the UFO spawn logic (requiring both timer<=0 AND random<0.01 per tick) makes it rarely appear.
Excellent implementation with full audio and mechanics, though the destructible shields are generated with a cutout at the top instead of the bottom (forming a U-shape instead of an arch).

Core loop, shooting, shields, waves, score, and game-over work, but there are notable authenticity/gameplay issues like odd shield shape, imperfect alien column shooting logic, and potentially annoying repeated UFO audio.
